title: TiFliz's LavaChicken
description: Adding the one and only Lava Chicken into Minecraft !🐔🔥
body:
<iframe width="560" height="315" src="https://www.youtube-nocookie.com/embed/OFENxhvBN0I" title="YouTube video player" frameborder="0" allow="accelerometer; autoplay; clipboard-write; encrypted-media; gyroscope; picture-in-picture; web-share" allowfullscreen></iframe>

# Have you ever dreamed of tasting Lava Chicken?
Now it’s possible with this NEW MOD — _but be careful_, it’s really hot! Eating Lava Chicken grants you a speed boost and fiery flame particles!

**How to get it?**

-Craft it using special ingredients

-Or throw a raw, cooked, or alive chicken into lava and watch the magic happen!
**And if you let it in the lava for too long it become THE MAGMA LAVA CHICKEN !**

![Recipe](https://cdn.modrinth.com/data/cached_images/2f8e552b67558eb3c91799155e4fc00e0bc03fd6.png)

**NEW MAGMA LAVA CHICKEN !!!**
**Hottest Chicken EVER**
Using this will grant you fire resistance, create a fiery trail behind you, and increase your movement speed!!

![MAGMA LAVA CHICKEN](https://cdn.modrinth.com/data/cached_images/4f731adbe34a6c4f436d05b6751d117a2e87cf82_0.webp)
![MAGMA LAVA CHICKEN](https://cdn.modrinth.com/data/cached_images/4d2196eb25103cf1c633d3da2c3cf6928e7e6fc3_0.webp)
![Magma Recipe](https://cdn.modrinth.com/data/cached_images/813dff72b587b4896456d760aa5b57e606d3acab.png)


**Spice up your Minecraft experience with the fiery Lava Chicken!**
